headline: A Look At DTE Energy (DTE) Valuation After A Steady Run In Recent Months
summary: What DTE Energy’s Recent Performance Tells You DTE Energy (DTE) has attracted attention after a steady run, with the stock showing gains over the past month, the past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. For investors, that recent performance sits against a backdrop of relatively modest reported annual revenue growth of 0.69% and net income growth of 9.08%, on revenue of about US$15.8b and net income of US$1.46b. See our latest analysis for DTE Energy. The share price has climbed...
